Stub for evicting app session capabilities in communication sessions.

# Purpose
This C header file defines a function prototype for [`comm_session_app_session_capabilities_evict`](<#comm_session_app_session_capabilities_evict>). The function takes a pointer to a `Uuid` structure, named `app_uuid`, as its parameter. The function is marked with the `WEAK` attribute, which suggests that it can be overridden by other implementations. The function body is empty, indicating that it serves as a placeholder or default implementation. The file includes two other headers: `services/common/comm_session/app_session_capabilities.h` and `util/attributes.h`, which may provide necessary definitions and attributes used in this file.
